items.title: Yankees Birthday of the Day: Ivy Andrews
items.summary: Is there anything better than old-timey baseball nicknames? Today, another Hall of Fame-caliber nickname, “Poison” Ivy Paul Andrews, would have celebrated his 119th birthday.
